evals.prompt: In my Unity project, generate a transparent inventory icon for a rare fire crystal and save it under Assets/Art/Icons.
evals.expected_output: Use unity-image-gen, collect or assume the Unity asset contract, generate a transparent icon through Unity MCP, save under Assets/Art/Icons without overwriting, and verify import plus alpha/console state.

evals.prompt: Create a 9:16 mobile loading screen background for this Unity game using Unity MCP.
evals.expected_output: Use unity-image-gen, route to Unity MCP image generation, choose or confirm an Assets path, prompt for a portrait background with safe UI space, refresh/import the asset, and report validation evidence.

evals.prompt: Capture a screenshot of the current Unity Game View including overlay UI and put it in Assets/Screenshots.
evals.expected_output: Use unity-image-gen, route to manage_camera screenshot without specifying a camera so overlay UI is included, save under Assets/Screenshots, then verify the capture is nonblank and console is clean.
